titleStmt.title: SII 41.508: original edition by S. Rajagopal
No. 508. (A.R. No. 721 of 1905.) Paḻani, Paḻani Taluk, Madurai District. On the west wall of the Periyāvuḍaiyār temple near Paḻani.

summary.p: Gift of land. This is the king's order to the sabhā and ūrār of Kōdaimangalam alias Ellāchōḻachaturvēdimangalam in Vaigāvūr-nāḍu regarding his gift of a kuḍinīṅgā-dēvadāna to the temple of Iruvirāl-Paramēśvaram-Uḍaiya-Nāyanār. Refers to the deities Subramaṇya-piḷḷaiyār and his consort set up respectively by Nallammai and Vikrama-Pāṇḍya-Ganganārāyaṇa-Chakravartikaḷ.
[Published in S. Raju, Paḻani Varalāṟṟu Āvaṇaṅgaḷ, 2015, p. 39.]

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svastiśrī . tiripuvaṉaccakkaravartti kOṉErimElkoṇṭāṉ vaikāvūr nāṭṭu kOtaimaṅkalamāṉa Ellā cOḻacaturvEtamaṅkalattu capaiyārkkum Ūrārkkum taṅkaḷūr Uṭaiyār Iruvirāl paramEcuvaramuṭaiya nāyaṉār kOyilil nallammai Eḻuntaruḷuvitta cuppiramaṇiyap piḷḷaiyārukkum
vikkiramapāṇṭiya kaṅkanārāyaṇac cakkaravarttikaḷ Eḻuntaruḷuvitta nācciyārkkum Amutupaṭicāttuppaṭi Uḷḷiṭṭa veñcaṉattukku taṅkaḷūrp paṟṟilum
pāṭṭappaṟṟilum Irupattiyēḻāvatu varaiyumpayirēttikāṭu pāḻāṉanilattilē Irupatteṭṭāvatu Āṭimāta mutal Añcumā nilam tiruttalāmiṭattē tiruttik kuṭinīṅkāttēvatāṉamāka payir ceytukoṇṭu miṉṉilattukku varum kaṭamai kuṭimai Antarāyam Iṟaipuravu cittāyam Elavai Ukavai kāṇikkai maṟṟum Eppērppaṭṭavaikaḷum kuṭinīṅkāttēvatāṉa Iṟaiyiliyākatak kuṭuttōm
Ippaṭikku yivvōlai piṭipāṭākak kaṭṭikkoṇṭu cantirātittarvaraikkum celvatākak kallilum cempilum veṭṭikkoḷvārkaḷākavum
Digital edition of SII 41.508 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
